Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Prohibits the use of the pesticide paraquat
Summary: Prohibits the distribution, sale, offer for sale, and use of any pesticide product containing paraquat dichloride or any other chemical form of paraquat.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law, in relation to prohibiting the use of the pesticide paraquat
